attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.PAYMENT_ID, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.PAYMENT_STATUS, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.INTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.ORG_ID, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.CREATED_BY, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.PAYMENT_DATE, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL
 WHERE 
 MF_IBY_PAYMENTS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
